title: lib/input
description:
This directory contains classes that are used to read data from input sources.
The classes in this directory collaborate to read data from various input sources,
such as compressed input splits and input streams. The classes in this directory
use the SplitCompressionInputStream class to read from compressed input splits,
and the Configuration class to configure the behavior of the line reader.
The classes in this directory also handle multi-byte delimiters correctly and
support customizable record delimiters.
